name: fetch_web_page
description: Fetches and extracts structured content from a given web page URL. Use this when you need to read or analyze information from a specific webpage, article, or online document. The tool returns the page title, a summary, and the full extracted text content.

url.description: The complete URL of the web page to fetch. Must include the protocol (http:// or https://). Example: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artificial_intelligence
